description: Install all dependencies, set up shadcn/ui with Tailwind CSS 4 compatibility, configure the project for framer-motion, lucide-react, and theme support. Establish the shared component foundation.
steps: Install production dependencies: framer-motion, lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge, class-variance-authority, @radix-ui/react-slot, @radix-ui/react-dialog, @radix-ui/react-tabs, @radix-ui/react-accordion, @radix-ui/react-navigation-menu, @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu, next-themes
Create lib/utils.ts with cn() utility function combining clsx and tailwind-merge
Create components/ui/button.tsx - shadcn-style Button component with variants using class-variance-authority
Create components/ui/tabs.tsx - shadcn-style Tabs component using @radix-ui/react-tabs
Create components/ui/accordion.tsx - shadcn-style Accordion component using @radix-ui/react-accordion
Create components/theme-provider.tsx - 'use client' component wrapping next-themes ThemeProvider
Update app/globals.css to include custom CSS variables for the purple/indigo color scheme, dark mode variables, and any needed Tailwind customizations (using Tailwind CSS 4 @theme inline syntax)
Update app/layout.tsx to wrap content with ThemeProvider, add global metadata for Kiro Hub, include Inter/Geist font setup
Run bun run build to verify everything compiles
acceptance_criteria: bun run build succeeds with no TypeScript errors
All UI utility components exist in components/ui/
globals.css has purple/indigo color scheme variables for light and dark modes
verification: Run 'bun run build' and confirm successful compilation
findings: All dependencies installed successfully with bun add. Build passes with expected worker_threads warnings (non-fatal). Tailwind CSS 4 @theme inline syntax works correctly for mapping CSS variables to Tailwind color utilities. next-themes ThemeProvider works with suppressHydrationWarning on html element. Used .dark class selector for dark mode variables (compatible with next-themes attribute='class').
